# @gcoredev/proxy-wasm-sdk-as

> AssemblyScript SDK for writing proxy-wasm filter plugins that run on the FastEdge CDN platform. Version 1.2.3.

## Documentation

- [@gcoredev/proxy-wasm-sdk-as Documentation](docs/INDEX.md)
- [Getting Started with the AssemblyScript Proxy-Wasm SDK](docs/quickstart.md)
- [AssemblyScript Proxy-Wasm SDK — API Reference](docs/SDK_API.md)
